title: Conservator
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''conservator''' preserved food. They could be found in kitchens and galleys.

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]''
*''[[Coruscant Nights III: Patterns of Force]]''

*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''
